title: ferray-autodiff: 16 free functions duplicate method API with zero added value
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Lines 642-736 define 16 free functions (sin, cos, tan, exp, ln, etc.) that each contain a single line delegating to the corresponding DualNumber method. Since DualNumber implements Float, users can call x.sin() directly. These free functions add no generic value over methods. Either remove them (YAGNI) or generate them with a macro to eliminate 100 lines of boilerplate.
